span.p: Section 225C: Offences against laws of Singapore where no special punishment ...

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: Does anything which by any law in force in Singapore he is prohibited from doing

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Omits to do anything which he is so enjoined to do

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: No special punishment is provided by the law for such commission or omission
